Let's Talk
TR EN
SAP RE-FX

SAP Real Estate Management

Manage your real estate portfolio from a single platform and optimize operations end-to-end.

With SAP RE-FX, transform your real estate operations into a centralized, transparent, and efficient structure. Reduce manual work, minimize errors, and enable data-driven decision-making.

Ideal for industries such as banking, retail, shopping malls, and real estate investment trusts, the solution delivers speed, control, and operational efficiency—while reducing time, cost, and resource usage.

What You Can Manage

real_estate_agent

Investment & Portfolio Management

square_foot

Space & Area-based Tracking

description

Lease Contracts & Escalation Terms

handshake

Ownership & Partnership Structures

engineering

Maintenance, Repair & Construction

account_balance

For Banking

Gain full control over branch operations:

  • check_circleBranch renovation and project management
  • check_circleLease and cost tracking
  • check_circleSpace (sqm) and volume management
  • check_circlePenalties and periodic adjustments
  • check_circleAsset tracking and maintenance workflows
storefront

For Retail, Malls & REITs

Simplify complex multi-tenant environments:

  • check_circleSublease contracts and billing processes
  • check_circleStore opening and renovation workflows
  • check_circleMaintenance and repair for offices, malls, and residential
  • check_circleLease tracking and cost control

Integrated Financial Excellence

SAP RE-FX integrates seamlessly with SAP FI (Financial Accounting) and CO (Controlling).

speed

Speed

Accelerate leasing and investment processes

analytics

Accurate Analysis

Perform accurate cost analysis

verified

Reliability

Manage valuation and financial transactions with confidence

Less Manual Work, More Strategic Value

Generate accurate, audit-ready reports. Optimize cost structures and automate repetitive workflows. Free up time to focus on high-value, strategic initiatives.

Simplify Your Real Estate Operations

Gain control over costs and future-proof your real estate portfolio with SAP RE-FX.
